/CAL: TO SET HEARING RE RETURN OF PROPERTY MOTION/DAWT/ /X: NO APPEARANCE BY THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/X: NO APPEARANCE BY THE PETITIONERS OR BY COUNSELFOR PETITIONERS, MR, RANDALL WITTE,/X: PRESENT IN COURT IS RONNIE WAGNER,SFPD LEGAL,/X: PARTIES HAVE REACHED JOINT STIPULATION RE RETURN OF PROPERTY MOTION, SEE WRITTEN JOINT STIPULATION AND ORDER ALLOWING RETURN OF PROPERTY,/
/CAL:DEF MO TO RETURN PROPERTY,SFPD RESPONSE, OPP TO RETURN/CONTD:TO SET HEARING REGARDING RETURN OF PROPERTY/DOP/
